list.title: Payments Review - Admin
list.description: Review payment and refund operations with amounts, currencies, and linked operational context.

detail.title: Finance operation event - Admin
detail.description: Inspect one finance operation event with operational context and linked references.

list.title: Session earning reviews - Admin
list.description: Review how session earnings are split between practitioners and the platform.

detail.title: Session earning review - Admin
detail.description: Inspect one session earning review with session, payment, and moderation context.

list.title: Payments review
list.note: Review payment and refund events by status, provider, currency, and reference. Use ledger/reconciliation for accounting traceability.

items.list: Review payment and refund events in one feed.
items.detail: Open an event to inspect the linked payment or refund context.
items.filters: Filter by status, provider, purpose, and date.

items.noControls: No command or override controls are available here.
items.noAnalyticsSuite: This is not a finance analytics suite.
items.noReconciliation: Manual reconciliation workflows are not exposed.

filters.queryPlaceholder: Search by summary or external reference

list.title: Session earning reviews
list.note: Review how session earnings are distributed between practitioners and the platform. Use the filters to focus on pending or finalized items.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by review ID, session code, practitioner, or patient
list.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your filters or switch between pending and finalized reviews.
list.errorTitle: Session earning reviews are not available right now
list.errorDescription: Could not load session earning review data right now.

detail.title: Review detail
detail.note: Inspect one earning review, the linked session, payment context, and moderation history.

overview.title: Current review state
overview.description: A quick snapshot of the review status and decision.

session.title: Session context
session.description: The linked session and how it was covered.

payment.title: Payment context
payment.description: The payment record that feeds the earning review.
payment.none: No payment record is linked to this review.

packagePurchase.title: Package purchase snapshot
packagePurchase.description: Snapshot data captured when the package was purchased.

packageSettlement.title: Package settlement snapshot
packageSettlement.description: Snapshot data from the package settlement record.

ledger.title: Ledger entries
ledger.description: Ledger rows created for this review, if any.
ledger.empty: No ledger entries were created for this review.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Choose the final review action. The original patient rating is preserved in the backend.
moderation.readOnly: This review is already finalized and can no longer be changed.
moderation.viewOnly: You can view this review, but only accounting admins can change its moderation decision.
moderation.stepUpNote: Sensitive moderation actions may require step-up.
moderation.internalReasonPlaceholder: Add the internal reason or note for this decision.
moderation.practitionerFacingNotePlaceholder: Optional note visible to the practitioner if the backend exposes it.

validation.finalAmounts: Please provide the final practitioner amount, platform amount, and currency.
validation.reasonRequired: Please add a reason for this decision.

feedback.error: Could not save the moderation decision.

actionDescriptions.approveAsIs: Keep the suggested settlement split and publish the current review result.
actionDescriptions.editAndApprove: Adjust the settlement split before approving the review.
actionDescriptions.rejectPayout: Mark the review as rejected for payout.
actionDescriptions.excludeFromPayout: Exclude this review from payout calculations.

states.errorTitle: This review is not available right now

list.title: Practitioner recoveries - Admin
list.description: Review practitioner recovery debts, linked sessions, payments, and payout-related context.

detail.title: Practitioner recovery detail - Admin
detail.description: Inspect one recovery debt with linked session, payment, refund, review, settlement, and action history context.

list.title: Practitioner recoveries
list.note: Review recovery debts that need manual collection or waiver. The list shows current amount, collected amount, remaining amount, and linked context.

table.title: Recovery queue
table.subtitle: Use the filters to find one practitioner recovery quickly.

actions.exportError: Could not prepare the export file.
actions.noDataToExport: No data is available to export.

bulkWaiveModal.title: Waive selected recoveries
bulkWaiveModal.description: Apply one shared waiver reason to the selected recoveries. Already resolved items will be skipped safely.
bulkWaiveModal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why these recoveries are waived
bulkWaiveModal.reasonRequired: Please add a reason before waiving these recoveries.
bulkWaiveModal.noEligibleSelection: No selected recoveries can be waived.
bulkWaiveModal.itemFailed: One selected recovery could not be waived.
bulkWaiveModal.error: Could not waive the selected recoveries right now.

states.emptyDescription: No recovery debts have been recorded yet.
states.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the filters or clear them to see all practitioner recoveries.
states.error: Could not load practitioner recoveries right now.

detail.title: Recovery detail
detail.note: Inspect the recovery debt, linked finance context, and action history. Manual collection and waiver stay with accounting admins.

context.title: Linked context
context.description: Practitioner, session, payment, refund, review, settlement, and payout context linked to this recovery.

history.title: Action history
history.description: Manual collection and waiver actions recorded against this recovery.
history.empty: No manual actions have been recorded yet.

review.title: Linked earning review
review.description: The earning review that led to this recovery debt, when available.

actions.title: Manual collection and waiver
actions.description: Record a manual collection or waive the remaining debt. Step-up may be required.
actions.viewOnly: You can view this recovery, but only accounting admins can collect or waive it.
actions.readOnly: This recovery has already been resolved and can no longer be changed.

validation.amountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
validation.amountExceedsRemaining: The amount cannot be greater than the remaining amount.
validation.reasonRequired: Please add a reason before waiving this recovery.

collect.title: Record manual collection
collect.description: Record the amount collected outside Sawiyaa. Partial collection is allowed.

waive.title: Waive recovery
waive.description: Waive the remaining amount with a required finance reason.
waive.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this recovery is waived
waive.hint: This decision is internal and does not change payout history.

states.errorTitle: This recovery is not available right now

detail.title: Event detail
detail.note: Use this view to inspect one event safely. This surface does not expose finance controls.

snapshot.heading: Operational snapshot
snapshot.note: A quick summary of current event posture.

paymentPending.title: Payment is in-flight
paymentPending.note: Payment is still pending or requires action.

paymentRecorded.title: Payment has settled
paymentRecorded.note: Payment was captured or moved into a refunded state.

paymentFailed.title: Payment failed
paymentFailed.note: Payment reached a failed state and needs diagnostics context.

refundInFlight.title: Refund is in-flight
refundInFlight.note: Refund exists and is still processing.

refundSucceeded.title: Refund completed
refundSucceeded.note: Refund succeeded and is recorded for traceability.

refundFailed.title: Refund failed
refundFailed.note: Refund failed and may require follow-up in dedicated finance workflows.

empty.heading: No operation events found
empty.note: No events match the current filters.

listError.heading: Finance operation events are not available right now

detailError.heading: This operation event is not available right now

errors.invalidFilter: One or more filters are invalid.
errors.finalAmountsRequired: Please provide the final amounts before approving this review.
errors.reasonRequired: Please add a reason for this moderation action.
errors.stepUpRequired: Additional verification is required to continue.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this finance operations scope.
errors.notFound: The requested operation event was not found.
errors.generic: Could not load finance operation data right now.
